description.en: The base class for all other module-specific exceptions.

excerpt.es: The base class for all other module-specific exceptions.
excerpt.en: The base class for all other module-specific exceptions.

description.en: Raised when some mailbox-related condition beyond the control of the program causes it to be unable to proceed, such as when failing to acquire a lock that another program already holds, or when a uniquely generated file name already exists.
